characters.name: Accountant
characters.description: AccountantInformation:GenderMaleInformation:Portrayed ByDennis QuilliganThisaccountantwas seen in the Dublin parish with theOlder PriestandTed Crilly, following the latter receiving the Golden Cleric award. He has been going over the church expenses when he questions the latter about a discrepancy, which as a result seesTedsent back to theCraggy Island Parochial House, much to the delight ofDougal McGuire.

characters.name: Accountant

characters.name: Alan
characters.description: AlanInformation:GenderMaleResides inCraggy IslandOccupationHost of the "King of the Sheep"JudgeInformation:Portrayed ByEamon RohanAlanwas the rambling host an a judge of the "King of the Sheep" competition. AsChriswas about to be declared the winner,Tedmade a scene exposing the whole plot, telling the judge his observations, including expensive items being worn by the other contestants (afterFargo Boylepaid them to spread rumours about the beast) and Fargo leaving a shop with aBBC Sound Effectsrecord thatDougalhad wanted to buy. Because of thisChrisis disqualified.

characters.name: Alan
characters.description: AlanInformation:GenderMaleResides inCraggy IslandOccupationHost of the "King of the Sheep"JudgeInformation:Portrayed ByEamon RohanAlanwas the rambling host an a judge of the "King of the Sheep" competition. Because of thisChrisis disqualified.

characters.name: Amon Hunter
characters.description: Amon Hunterwas a priest, who at one point hadFather Ted Crillyin a headlock, from which he escaped. He is now working with some pygmies in the south seas.

characters.name: Ants
characters.description: TheAntslive in the field that the Parochial House is in.Dougalinvestigates them with binoculars but is not clear whether they are giant in size or whether he merely has a pair of very powerful binoculars.

characters.name: Ants
characters.description: TheAntslive in the field that the Parochial House is in.Dougalinvestigates them with binoculars but is not clear whether they are giant in size or whether he merely has a pair of very powerful binoculars.

characters.name: Assumpta Fitzgerald
characters.description: Assumpta FitzgeraldInformation:GenderFemaleOccupationPublicanInformation:Portrayed ByDervla KirwanAssumpta Fitzgeraldis a main character in the Irish television seriesBallykissangel. Appearing inTed Crilly's dream sequence, she is the object of his affection and calls him the best priest she knows whilePeter Clifford, who is almost weighed down by suitcases, attempts to say his goodbyes to both him and her but is blanked by both beforeTedis awoken byDougal, who offers him a peanut.

characters.name: Austin Purcell
characters.description: Austin PurcellInformation:Nickname(s)The Most Boring Priest in the WorldGenderMaleOccupationPriestHair ColorBrownInformation:Portrayed ByBen KeatonAustin Purcellis a priest who works in a parish somewhere in Ireland. He has been described as the most boring priest in the world byTed Crilly. He has a habit of talking about something and then changing the subject to something completely different, which many people find incredibly irritating. He seems not to care if the person he is talking to isn't listening, or if they had gotten so bored they have left him. Purcell has done some mission work in Nigeria. However, the entire population of the village he was staying in got so bored that they all sailed away in a boat. This resulted in the boat sinking after a mile or so, and they were all eaten by alligators, despite the fact that there are no wild alligators in Nigeria.

characters.name: Barty Dunne
characters.description: Barty DunneInformation:Full NameBartholomew DunneNickname(s)BartyGenderMaleOccupationPriestHair ColorBrownFriendsTed CrillyInformation:Portrayed ByFergus O'KellyBarty Dunne, portrayed by Irish actorFergus O'Kelly, is a priest who laughs at everything even if what he or anyone else is saying is not funny. He bringsHenry Sellersto theparochial houseonCraggy Islandand hosts the"All Priests Stars in Their Eyes Lookalike Competition", which the three Craggy Island priests win. He also reveals toTedthat the BBC firedHenrydue to his massive drinking problem after the latter goes berserk following drinking alcohol that was offered to him following the priests' victory.

characters.name: Barty Dunne
characters.description: Barty DunneInformation:Full NameBartholomew DunneNickname(s)BartyGenderMaleOccupationPriestHair ColorBrownFriendsTed CrillyInformation:Portrayed ByFergus O'KellyBarty Dunne, portrayed by Irish actorFergus O'Kelly, is a priest who laughs at everything even if what he or anyone else is saying is not funny. He also reveals toTedthat the BBC firedHenrydue to his massive drinking problem after the latter goes berserk following drinking alcohol that was offered to him following the priests' victory.

characters.name: Beast of Craggy Island
characters.description: The Beast of Craggy Island, also known simply asThe Beast, is a mythical creature which many ofCraggy Island's inhabitants believe is terrorising sheep, There are many conflicting rumours as to the Beast's physical form. It has been described byHud Hastingsas being "as big as a jaguar" and it's entire face being nothing but "big, white teeth as sharp as knives" while Mrs. Doyle believes it to be a "sort of giant fox".Dougaldescribes the creature as being the size of four cats, having a retractable leg "so it can leap up at you better", luminus in the dark, having four ears (two of which seve as "backup ears", and some of which are actually inside the creature's head), claws the size of cups, an unexplained phobia of stamps, a magnetic tail (according to Mrs Doyle), having "four arses" where a mouth should be (in contrast to Hudd's earlier description), only having eyebrows on Saturdays and it's yawn supposedly sounds like "Liam Neeson chasing a load of chickens around in a barrel". The beast is discovered to be a hoax by FathersTed CrillyandDougal McGuire. Ted exposes Fargo Boyle as having used bribery to spread rumours of The Beast to manipulate the "King of the Sheep" competition. The mysterious howling noise which was effecting Chris the Sheep's nerves is revealed to be 'Terrible Monster- Type A', a track from the BBC Sound Effects record, used by Fargo with speakers hanging in trees, in order to frighten his own sheep and (with Ted's help) stage a "miraculous recovery on the day of the competition" to improve his chances of winning.

characters.name: Beast of Craggy Island
characters.description: The Beast of Craggy Island, also known simply asThe Beast, is a mythical creature which many ofCraggy Island's inhabitants believe is terrorising sheep, There are many conflicting rumours as to the Beast's physical form. It has been described byHud Hastingsas being "as big as a jaguar" and it's entire face being nothing but "big, white teeth as sharp as knives" while Mrs. Doyle believes it to be a "sort of giant fox".Dougaldescribes the creature as being the size of four cats, having a retractable leg "so it can leap up at you better", luminus in the dark, having four ears (two of which seve as "backup ears", and some of which are actually inside the creature's head), claws the size of cups, an unexplained phobia of stamps, a magnetic tail (according to Mrs Doyle), having "four arses" where a mouth should be (in contrast to Hudd's earlier description), only having eyebrows on Saturdays and it's yawn supposedly sounds like "Liam Neeson chasing a load of chickens around in a barrel". The beast is discovered to be a hoax by FathersTed CrillyandDougal McGuire. Ted exposes Fargo Boyle as having used bribery to spread rumours of The Beast to manipulate the "King of the Sheep" competition. The mysterious howling noise which was effecting Chris the Sheep's nerves is revealed to be 'Terrible Monster- Type A', a track from the BBC Sound Effects record, used by Fargo with speakers hanging in trees, in order to frighten his own sheep and (with Ted's help) stage a "miraculous recovery on the day of the competition" to improve his chances of winning.

characters.name: Benny Cake
characters.description: Benny CakeInformation:Full NameBenjamin CakeGenderMaleOccupationPriestSinger Benny Cakeis a priest who, asTedtellsDougal, attempted a music career that saw him release a song called 'Vienna', which topped the UK charts. The song is a reference to the 1981 song of the same name released by Ultravox, which was infamously kept off the top spot of the UK charts by the song 'Shaddap You Face' by Joe Dolce Music Theatre.

characters.name: Big Brendan
characters.description: Big BrendanInformation:Nickname(s)King of the SheepGenderMaleResides inCraggy Island Big Brendanis a burping sheep who won theKing of the Sheepcompetition in 1983 butTedwas convinced it was a fluke.

characters.name: Billy Kerrigan
characters.description: Billy KerriganInformation:Full NameWilliam KerriganGenderMaleOccupationPriestHair ColorBlondeFriendsTed CrillyDougal McGuireInformation:Portrayed ByArthur Mathews Billy Kerriganis a priest who is a friend ofTed Crilly. He was portrayed by series co-creatorArthur Mathews. He is seen atTed's birthday party as a guest. The latter previously thoughtPaul Stonewould have gone home by then but was wrong, leading to everyone being depressed while the event was supposed to be a happy one.

characters.name: Billy Kerrigan

characters.name: Billy O'Dwyer
characters.description: Billy O'DwyerInformation:Full NameWilliam O'DwyerNickname(s)The SpinmasterGenderMaleResides inCraggy IslandOccupationPriestEye ColorBrownHair ColorBrownFriendsTed CrillyInformation:Portrayed ByGerry O'Brien Billy O'Dwyeris a DJ and priest who gigged at a disco and raffle thatTedandDougalorganized to raise funds in order to fix the leaking roof of the parochial house. He has a serious gambling addiction, which caused him to buy 2,000 raffle tickets and landed him in severe debts. He was portrayed by Irish actorGerry O'Brien.

characters.name: Billy Williams
characters.description: Billy WilliamsInformation:Full NameWilliam WilliamsGenderMaleOccupationPriest and Arms DealerFriendsLarry DuffTed CrillyBilly Williamsis a minor character. Appearing in theSeries 2episode "Old Grey Whistle Theft", he is a priest and illegal arms dealer who was stopped at a checkpoint along withLarry Duffand two other priests while they were on their way to meetTedfor his picnic as the soldiers found that he possessed a box of machine gun. He was shot dead by a soldier after trying to escape.

characters.name: Billy Williams

characters.name: Bishop Facks
characters.description: Bishop FacksInformation:GenderMaleOccupationBishopHair ColorGreyFriendsLarry DuffBishop O'NeillBishop JordanInformation:Portrayed ByDenys Hawthorne Bishop Fackswas a kindly bishop who took great pride in his position. Unfortunately he also had a loud, and physically pushy demeanor with a nasty habit of finger poking to make his point. When theHoly Stone of Clonrichertis upgraded to a Class 2 relic, Facks along withBishop O'NeillandBishop Jordan, visits the parochial house but he ends up having the relic shoved up his backside after pokingFather Jackcontinuously on the shoulder.

characters.name: Bishop Jordan
characters.description: Bishop JordanInformation:GenderMaleOccupationBishopHair ColorGreyInformation:Portrayed ByPaddy WardWhen theHoly Stone of Clonrichertis upgraded to a Class 2 relic,Bishop Jordan, along withBishop O'NeillandBishop Facks, visits the parochial house to conduct a ceremony. He has a weak heart and initially suffers a setback whenDougalscreams as he has remembered thatAliensis being shown on TV. Jordan ends up dying after standing over the drain leading from the toilet in the bathroom whichTedflushes after he excuses himself to use it. WhenMrs. Doylediscovers him dead, she has actually confused him for a pile of rubbish.

characters.name: Brian Eno
characters.description: Brian EnoInformation:GenderMaleFriendsTed CrillyFather AlanInformation:Portrayed ByBrian EnoBrian Enois one of the priests who attends theIt's Great Being a Priest '98festival.

characters.name: Brian Noonan
characters.description: Brian NoonanInformation:GenderMaleResides inCraggy IslandOccupationJunior ministerFamilyJane(wife)Unnamed sonFriendsBishop BrennanInformation:Portrayed ByDavid HeapBrian Noonanis a junior minister who is a friend ofBishop Brennan. While walking through the woods late at night with his family, they hear a crackling sound and come face to face with a nudeJack Hackett, who has been sleepwalking much to their horror. Noonan reports this incident toBishop Brennan, who phonesTed Crillyto announce that he will be visiting the priests to discuss the matter.

characters.name: Brian Noonan

characters.name: Buzz Cagney
characters.description: Buzz CagneyInformation:GenderMaleOccupationPriestHair ColorBlackInformation:Portrayed ByJeff HardingBuzz Cagneyis an in-your-face loud American priest. Attending theIt's Great Being a Priest '98'celebration, he is impressed withTed Crilly's ability to talkFather Kevinout of committing suicide by jumping from a window ledge. He offersTedthe chance to work in a parish in the United States and the latter jumps at the chance of getting away fromCraggy Islandand his fellow housemates until he learns that his intended parish is ridden with gun violence, which convinces him to stay where he is.

characters.name: Buzz Cagney

characters.name: Father Cave
characters.description: Father CaveInformation:GenderMaleFriendsFather GallagherInformation:Portrayed ByKevin GildeaWhile the priests were on their flight home from a pilgrimage, it landed in trouble due toDougalpressing the red emergency button in the cockpit, which caused the plane to run out of fuel. Teddecided to hold a competition to see who would get the two parachutes available onboard and when it came toFather Cave's turn he said that he hadn't written anything down as what he planned to say came from the heart. Turning toFather Gallaghernext to him he told the latter that he was in love with him and that he should get the last parachute as the latter looked on speechless. Following the plane being saved, the two priests looked on quietly as the other priests and nuns cheered.

characters.name: Father Cave
characters.description: Father CaveInformation:GenderMaleFriendsFather GallagherInformation:Portrayed ByKevin GildeaWhile the priests were on their flight home from a pilgrimage, it landed in trouble due toDougalpressing the red emergency button in the cockpit, which caused the plane to run out of fuel. Teddecided to hold a competition to see who would get the two parachutes available onboard and when it came toFather Cave's turn he said that he hadn't written anything down as what he planned to say came from the heart. Turning toFather Gallaghernext to him he told the latter that he was in love with him and that he should get the last parachute as the latter looked on speechless. Following the plane being saved, the two priests looked on quietly as the other priests and nuns cheered.

characters.name: Charles Hedges
characters.description: Charles HedgesInformation:GenderMaleOccupationTV producerRomancesFred Rickwood(lover)Information:Portrayed ByPeter CaffreyCharles Hedges, portrayed byPeter Caffrey, is a TV executive who produces theSong for Europecompetition thatTed Crilly,Dougal McGuire,Dick ByrneandCyril MacDuffall enter to find Ireland's next Eurovision entry. When he initially mentions toTedthat he andFred Rickwoodare partners,Tedthinks he means that they work together until Charles mentions that the two men are lovers, which makesTednoticeably uncomfortable, since the Church believes that homosexuality is wrong, and he puts his foot in his mouth until Charles asks him if he is looking forward to the show. He expresses admiration forFred's presenting skills and afterwards as they celebrateTedandDougal's win an angryDickstorms into the room, complaining that his andCyril's song should have won instead asTedandDougal's entry was just the same note played over and over again. Charles andFredexplain thatTedandDougal's entry just had more to it, giving an illogical explanation for why they chose it until Charles quietly tellsFredthat they should getTedandDougalout the back exit to the building because of the angry mob outside.

characters.name: Charles Hedges

He expresses admiration forFred's presenting skills and afterwards as they celebrateTedandDougal's win an angryDickstorms into the room, complaining that his andCyril's song should have won instead asTedandDougal's entry was just the same note played over and over again. Charles andFredexplain thatTedandDougal's entry just had more to it, giving an illogical explanation for why they chose it until Charles quietly tellsFredthat they should getTedandDougalout the back exit to the building because of the angry mob outside.

characters.name: Chris
characters.description: ChrisInformation:Full NameChrisNickname(s)King of the SheepGenderMaleResides inCraggy IslandChrisisFargo Boyle's multiple winner of "King of The Sheep" who suffers a crisis of confidence and starts burping when an entity known as the "Beast of Craggy Island" terrorizes the island.FargoemploysTed(who bet all of his heating allowance money on Chris winning) andDougalto cure him, which proves to be a success. Tedlater discovers thatFargohad arranged for Chris to be frightened bythe Beastin order to increase the meagre odds being offered for his victory. AfterTedexposes the plot at the competition, Chris is disqualified. However, this also results inTedlosing his bet and thus all of the heating allowance money.

characters.name: Chris

characters.name: Father Clarke
characters.description: Father ClarkeInformation:GenderMaleResides inBarren IslandOccupationPriestFriendsTed CrillyDerek BeechingInformation:Portrayed ByArthur MathewsFather Clarkeis a priest. AfterDougal McGuiretakes onPat Mustard's job as the island's milkman following the latter's firing, Mustard places a bomb under the milk float that will go off if the vehicle goes under 4 mph. Ted,Derek BeechingandFather Clarkeformulate a plan to save him, one of which sees the priests saying Mass on a mobile altar as they pass the milk float.

characters.name: Father Clarke
characters.description: Father ClarkeInformation:GenderMaleResides inBarren IslandOccupationPriestFriendsTed CrillyDerek BeechingInformation:Portrayed ByArthur MathewsFather Clarkeis a priest. characters.name: Clint Power
characters.description: Clint PowerInformation:GenderMaleClint Poweris a priest who is an old acquaintance ofTed Crilly. Tedwas confused when he saw the feminist headline 'Clit Power' in a magazine, as he thought that the article was referring to Clint Power.

characters.name: Colm
characters.description: ColmInformation:GenderMaleResides inCraggy IslandOccupationFarmerInformation:Portrayed ByEamon RohanColmis a resident ofCraggy Island. WhenTeddecides to go out for a walk to clear his head, the old farmer shouts from over the wall that he heard that the priest is a racist. However, his own profession gives him less time to devote himself to any sort of racism. WhenTedwalks off, he andMrs. Carberryhave a normal chat with each other.

characters.name: Colm
characters.description: ColmInformation:GenderMaleResides inCraggy IslandOccupationFarmerInformation:Portrayed ByEamon RohanColmis a resident ofCraggy Island. WhenTeddecides to go out for a walk to clear his head, the old farmer shouts from over the wall that he heard that the priest is a racist. However, his own profession gives him less time to devote himself to any sort of racism. WhenTedwalks off, he andMrs. Carberryhave a normal chat with each other.

characters.name: Cyril MacDuff
characters.description: Cyril MacDuffInformation:Full NameCyril MacDuffGenderMaleOccupationPriestEye ColorBlueHair ColorBrownFriendsDick ByrneJim JohnsonInformation:Portrayed ByDon WycherleyCyril McDuffisDougal McGuire's equivalent onRugged Island. He is extremely dim-witted and because of thisDick Byrneoften gets irritated with him. He first appears in theSeries 1episode "Competition Time" as a member of The Supremes along withDick ByrneandJim Johnson, ultimately losing a bet with theCraggy Islandpriests. He is next seen entering theSong for Europe'contest to choose Ireland's next Eurovision entry, ultimately losing again. However, the Rugged Island priests manage to get one over on their enemies when they backtrack on their Lenten vows only for it to backfire whenSister Assumptais sent to teach them a lesson.

characters.name: Damien Lennon
characters.description: Damien LennonInformation:Full NameDamien LennonNickname(s)DamoGenderMaleResides inCraggy IslandOccupationPriestFamilyFather Frost(carer)FriendsDougal McGuireInformation:Portrayed ByJoe RooneyDamien Lennon, nicknamedDamo, is a fellow priest who is an idol ofDougal McGuire. He is very rebellious as he smokes, loves football, as well as the British group Oasis (he openly hates Blur) and convincesDougalto get an earring (much toTed's anger). He is the real culprit behind the theft ofMr. Benson's whistle but gives it toDougalto keep safe for him. He is forced to confess to the theft by his housemateFather Frost.

characters.name: Deaf Signer
characters.description: Deaf SignerInformation:GenderFemaleInformation:Portrayed ByMaggie ConwayThis unnameddeaf signerassistedNiamh Connollyas she was performing on a television show but got confused when the song descended into nonsensical gibberish.

characters.name: Delivery Man
characters.description: Delivery ManInformation:GenderMaleResides inCraggy IslandInformation:Portrayed ByFrank Keane Following the deaths ofSeamus Fitzpatrickand theOld Nazi, anunnamed delivery manbrought some items to theCraggy Island Parochial House. However, whenMrs. Doyleoffered to make him a cup of tea, he politely declined by explaining that he could die if he drank it.Mrs. Doylereplied that she would make him one anyway but he again declined and left.
